hooks.command: echo '[PreToolUse] Validating no direct AI provider calls in file'
echo '[PostToolUse] File written — remember: run Metro compile gate before shipping'

PreCommit.command: grep -r 'sk-ant-\|sk-\|api\.anthropic\.com\|api\.openai\.com' --include='*.js' app/ src/ && echo 'SECRET OR DIRECT AI CALL DETECTED — COMMIT BLOCKED' && exit 1 || echo 'PreCommit: Clean — no secrets or direct AI calls'

SessionStart.command: echo '=== SaintSal Labs iOS Session Started ===' && echo 'Repo: SaintSalLabs-iOS' && echo 'Stack: Expo | React Native | Hermes | EAS | TestFlight' && echo 'RULE: SSE = XHR only. AI = Gateway only.' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || true
